meta.title: Pulse — Live chat systems
meta.description: Three realtime chat systems: Direct, Rooms, and Groups.

landing.heroCopy: Direct, rooms, and private groups — designed to feel calm, fast, and intentional.
landing.systemsTitle: Three ways to talk. One quiet interface.
landing.directCopy: Private one-to-one threads with instant delivery.
landing.qualityTitle: Everything underneath is tuned for clarity and speed.
landing.realtimeCopy: Messages fan out over Server-Sent Events the moment they land in SQLite.
landing.authCopy: Better Auth sessions, handles, and protected chat routes — ready for demos.
landing.designCopy: Soft black, warm stone, and platinum tokens keep every screen visually in sync.
landing.flowTitle: From login to live thread in three moves.
landing.flowCopy: No Docker. No socket server. A file database, a session cookie, and an SSE stream — enough to feel production-shaped.
landing.step1Copy: Create a handle or jump in with a seeded demo account.
landing.step2Copy: Move between Direct, Rooms, and Groups without losing context.
landing.step3Copy: Compose once — every connected client sees it stream in.
landing.stackTitle: Modern, lean, and easy to demo cold.
landing.stackCopy: Next.js App Router, Drizzle on SQLite, Better Auth, and SSE realtime — chosen for performance and resume clarity.
landing.ctaCopy: Use a demo account and send a message in seconds.
landing.heroBubbleIn: Ready to pressure-test the realtime layer?
landing.heroRoomBody: Motion on the composer feels ready.

chat.directEmpty: Search someone above to open a private thread.
chat.roomsEmpty: Create a public room or join one from Discover.
chat.groupsEmpty: Create a private group or join with an invite code.
chat.directIdleTitle: Pick a person. Talk in private.
